title: Python: DodagState.neighbor_id type change may break external callers
description:
In python/src/lichen/rpl/dodag.py, ParentCandidate.neighbor_id was changed from str to IPv6Address. While internal tests were updated, any external code calling process_dio() with a string neighbor_id will now fail silently or produce incorrect behavior since the dict keys won't match.

Location: python/src/lichen/rpl/dodag.py:79, 109, 133, 163
Risk: External callers passing str instead of IPv6Address will have dict lookups fail silently.
Fix: Either add input coercion (to_ipv6) in process_dio, or document the API break and verify no external callers exist.
